title: Play Safe
writer: Monty Banks, Charles Horan, Harry Sweet
actors: Monty Banks, Virginia Lee Corbin, Charles Hill Mailes
plot: A gang of bad guys menace a feller's gal. She hides in a freight car and a misstep sends the otherwise-empty train out of the station with the lever pushed to full speed. As the train gains speed, the captive's boyfriend must boar...
